queries: E2E pipeline Using Apache Kafka for Real-Time Data Streams 2023 site:edu OR site:gov OR site:apache.org OR site:confluent.io
action.query: E2E pipeline Using Apache Kafka for Real-Time Data Streams 2023 site:edu OR site:gov OR site:apache.org OR site:confluent.io

annotations.title: Scalable E-Commerce Data Pipelines with Kafka: Real-Time Analytics, Batch, ML, Data Lake, and Beyond | Current 2023 | KR
Real-time Fraudulent Trips Detection with Xueyao Jiang | DE
Confluent Releases KSQL, a Streaming SQL Engine for Apache Kafka | FR
Confluent Intelligence: Real-Time AI With Apache Kafka® and Apache Flink®
Building CDC Pipelines With Apache Flink® | Confluent
Confluent Unveils Apache Flink® on Confluent Cloud, Making it Easier to Build Real-Time
Apache Beam: Introduction to Batch and Stream Data Processing

content.text:
Apache Kafka is a distributed streaming platform that enables the construction of real-time data pipelines and applications. It facilitates the seamless integration and processing of data streams, making it a cornerstone for building end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines.

Here are some authoritative and recent resources that delve into using Apache Kafka for real-time data streams:

1. **Scalable E-Commerce Data Pipelines with Kafka: Real-Time Analytics, Batch, ML, Data Lake, and Beyond**  
   This presentation from the Current 2023 conference discusses building robust data pipelines using Kafka, integrating streaming analytics, batch processing, data lakes, and machine learning. It provides insights into handling massive data volumes and delivering real-time analytics. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/ko-kr/events/current/2023/scalable-e-commerce-data-pipelines-with-kafka-real-time-analytics-batch-ml/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Real-Time Fraudulent Trips Detection with Kafka Streams**  
   Presented at Kafka Summit London 2023, this talk by Xueyao Jiang from FREENOW explores the implementation of an event stream processing pipeline using Kafka Streams and Kafka Connect on Kubernetes to detect GPS-based fraudulent trips in real-time. It offers practical insights into building real-time fraud detection systems. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/de-de/events/kafka-summit-london-2023/real-time-fraudulent-trips-detection/?utm_source=openai))

3. **Confluent Releases KSQL, a Streaming SQL Engine for Apache Kafka**  
   This announcement introduces KSQL, an open-source streaming SQL engine that enables continuous, interactive queries on Apache Kafka. KSQL simplifies stream processing by allowing developers to use SQL for real-time data analysis. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/fr-fr/press-release/confluent-releases-ksql-streaming-sql-engine-apache-kafka/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Confluent Intelligence: Real-Time AI With Apache Kafka® and Apache Flink®**  
   This resource discusses Confluent Intelligence, a fully managed service designed for building real-time, context-rich AI systems. It unifies stream processing, state management, and context delivery, enabling the development of event-driven, context-aware AI applications powered by Apache Kafka and Flink. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/product/confluent-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))

5. **Database Streaming with ksqlDB**  
   This page introduces ksqlDB, a database purpose-built for stream processing applications. It allows for real-time data processing using a familiar SQL syntax, simplifying the development of streaming applications. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/product/ksqldb/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Building CDC Pipelines With Apache Flink® on Confluent**  
   This resource explores building Change Data Capture (CDC) pipelines using Apache Flink on Confluent. It highlights how stream processing can power event-driven applications and trusted data products with fresh, processed data integrated across various systems. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/use-case/cdc-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

7. **Confluent Unveils Apache Flink® on Confluent Cloud, Making it Easier to Build Real-Time Applications with Stream Processing on a Unified Platform**  
   This announcement details the open preview of Apache Flink on Confluent Cloud, a fully managed service for stream processing. It simplifies building real-time applications by enabling the filtering, joining, and enriching of data streams with Flink. ([investors.confluent.io](https://investors.confluent.io/node/9236/pdf?utm_source=openai))

8. **Apache Beam: Introduction to Batch and Stream Data Processing**  
   This resource introduces Apache Beam, a flexible programming SDK for building data processing pipelines that handle both batch and stream processing. It allows developers to define and execute data workflows on various processing engines, including Apache Flink, Apache Spark, Google Cloud Dataflow, and Kafka. ([confluent.io](https://www.confluent.io/learn/apache-beam/?utm_source=openai))

These resources provide comprehensive insights into leveraging Apache Kafka for building efficient and scalable end-to-end data pipelines, particularly for real-time data streams.
